evals.prompt: Run a Symphony backend UAT proof for GitHub in this repo. Use the real configured GitHub Projects v2 backend, cover every direct helper operation, and give me provider proof links.
evals.expected_output: Uses symphony-backend-uat, runs or proposes the GitHub test command, reports health, shared helper coverage, PR helper results or skip reason, evidence paths, created IDs, and provider proof links.

evals.prompt: The Linear tracker path changed and LINEAR_API_KEY is already set. Prove the Symphony direct helper contract still works against Linear and leave evidence.
evals.expected_output: Uses symphony-backend-uat, runs or proposes the Linear test command, creates parent and child provider issues, verifies comments and document helpers, and reports evidence paths and proof links.

evals.prompt: We added a Symphony helper operation. Update the backend UAT skill so future proof runs know about the current helper contract and prompt references.
evals.expected_output: Uses update mode, refreshes generated Symphony contract from helper.rs and prompt files, and states any runner coverage gaps.

evals.prompt: A previous Symphony backend UAT failed halfway through and I have the evidence.json path. Clean up whatever backend state it created and tell me what was closed.
evals.expected_output: Uses cleanup mode with the evidence path, closes or completes created provider issues when possible, reports cleanup status, and avoids creating a new test run.
